title: Flavorful Springy Ethiopian Injera Fir Fir
description: A kid-friendly Ethiopian dish featuring almond essence and shio-cure, with a springy texture and umami flavor, made with anti-inflammatory friendly ingredients.
instructions: In a large pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the torn injera bread to the pan and stir to coat with oil.
In a small bowl, whisk together the almond milk, shio-cure seasoning, almond essence, turmeric, ginger, salt, and black pepper.
Pour the wet ingredients over the injera bread and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the mixture has thickened and the bread is springy.
Serve the fir fir hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Let the dish cool completely before refrigerating or freezing for later use.
Reheat the fir fir over low heat, stirring occasionally, until warmed through.
